text: The emptiness of the glass-walled room fills me with anticipation and curiosity—what conversations or lessons await in such a sterile, modern space? As I move to the vibrant, information-rich wall of the next room, I feel more alive and engaged. Here, surrounded by artifacts, screens, and layered narratives, I sense the relentless curiosity that propels humanity forward. The contrast between the quiet preparation of the meeting room and the dynamic presence of the exhibition stirs within me both a longing for connection and an appreciation for the contemplative solitude of discovery.
